title: Who's next at UNC? Potential candidates to replace Hubert Davis, their priorities
content: Hubert Davis is out after five seasons in Chapel Hill. Here are names expected to be on the short list.

title: UNC fires coach Davis after early tourney exit
content: North Carolina men's basketball coach Hubert Davis was fired by the school after another early exit in the NCAA tournament.

title: L.A. spoils Tiger's return, cruises to TGL title
content: Tiger Woods competed for the first time in more than a year and that wasn't nearly enough to stop Los Angeles Golf Club, which made three straight eagles to close out a 9-2 victory in the TGL finals Tuesday night to capture the SoFi Cup.

title: Grizzlies rule Morant's season over due to elbow
content: Ja Morant will miss the rest of the season with an ulnar collateral ligament sprain in his left elbow but is expected to be ready for the start of the 2026-27 season.

title: Elite longevity: Flacco, 41, agrees to Cincy deal
content: Quarterback Joe Flacco is coming back for a 19th NFL season, agreeing to a one-year, $6 million deal with the Bengals, sources told ESPN's Jeremy Fowler.

title: Sources: Crow-Armstrong deal for 6 years, $115M
content: Pete Crow-Armstrong's new contract extension with the Chicago Cubs is for six years and $115 million, sources told ESPN's Jeff Passan on Tuesday.

title: NBA players' union calls for 65-game rule change
content: The NBPA is calling on the league to, at minimum, amend the 65-game rule for players to be eligible for end-of-season awards.

title: Thomas sues White Sox for using name on jersey
content: Hall of Famer Frank Thomas has filed a lawsuit against the White Sox, alleging unauthorized use of his likeness on City Connect 2.0 uniforms last season.

title: House passes Ali Revival Act; bill heads to Senate
content: The Muhammad Ali Boxing Revival Act, which would shift the structure of pro boxing by allowing Unified Boxing Organizations as options for boxers, passed the U.S. House of Representatives by a voice vote Tuesday.

title: ⚾ Fantasy baseball draft guide: Rankings, more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the 2026 fantasy baseball season.

title: Rankings, playoff odds for all 30 teams as baseball returns
content: Whether your club enters Opening Day as the team to beat or hoping to be 2026's biggest surprise, we've got you covered.

title: Ranking every NFL free agency class: Solak on what he liked -- and didn't like -- for all 32 teams
content: How did all 32 NFL teams fare in March, taking into account free agent signings, trades, extensions and departures? We stacked each class.

title: Barnwell on a surprising free agency trend going back to 2013
content: Let's look at the largest NFL contracts from 2013 to 2022 to see how often megadeals meet expectations.

title: Predicting Rounds 1-2 of the NFL draft: Yates finds landing spots for 64 top prospects
content: Field Yates unveils his latest NFL mock draft, projecting two full rounds. Which top prospects could go in the opening 64 picks?

title: Ranking Ohio State's first-round receivers since 2022: How does Carnell Tate stack up?
content: Tate could be the WR1 of the 2026 draft. But how does he compare to Jaxon Smith-Njigba, among others?

title: The trade that wasn't: Inside the Maxx Crosby saga between the Raiders, Ravens
content: We talked to people about the Maxx Crosby trade situation to find out what really went down between Baltimore and Las Vegas.

title: NHL playoff watch: Projecting the Sabres' first-round opponent
content: Wednesday's matchup against Boston could be repeated in April. Plus, updated playoff projections after Tuesday's massive slate.

title: What's next for Florida, Kansas, Kentucky, UNC: Recruits, transfer portal, more
content: Their NCAA tournament runs ended early and now it's all about next season. Here's how it's taking shape.

title: UConn star Azzi Fudd and the family behind her final March
content: Azzi Fudd's "imperfectly perfect" family has been her rock through ACL tears, dog food pranks and Beyoncé on repeat. Now they're hoping for one more NCAA tournament title for UConn.

title: NBA draft stock watch: Latest buzz, scouting reports on 21 top prospects
content: Which 2026 NBA draft prospects helped or hurt their stock after an exciting first weekend during March Madness?

title: NBA playoff watch: Nuggets, Suns face off in key West battle
content: Can Phoenix make up ground in the West standings? Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings.

title: From Arizona to Texas: Ranking the men's Sweet 16 teams
content: Six Big Ten teams! Upset-minded Texas! Buzzer-beaters and blowouts! Here's how the Sweet 16 teams stack up.

title: Ranking the remaining 16 teams in the women's NCAA tournament
content: Six SEC teams and five from the ACC (including a 10-seed!) help make up the Sweet 16. Here's how they stack up.

title: Robot umps in MLB? What to know about new balls-and-strikes challenge system
content: Baseball's next big rule change is here. Here is how automated ball-strike challenges will shape the 2026 season.

title: Salah's exit felt inevitable and then inconceivable: Examining Liverpool's huge loss
content: It's hard to imagine Liverpool without Mohamed Salah, but all good things must come to an end. Could his farewell include an FA Cup or Champions League trophy?

title: Arsenal teach Chelsea a Champions League lesson in clinical finishing
content: Arsenal will head into the second leg of their UWCL quarterfinal against Chelsea with a commanding 3-1 lead thanks to some lethal finishing from Stina Blackstenius, Chloe Kelly and Alessia Russo.

title: NWSL Power Rankings: Angel City, Dash on the rise but Thorns still on top
content: Angel City and the Houston Dash are quickly making their way to the top of ESPN's NWSL Power Rankings, but their rise isn't enough to make them No. 1.

title: Feeling lucky? What turnovers and late-game success say about 2026
content: Some 2025 teams couldn't get a break. Others, such as Indiana, had luck and success. What changes in 2026?

title: How Jaxon Smith-Njigba's contract extension impacts Seahawks, Rams' Puka Nacua
content: Answering five questions about the record-breaking contract extension for the NFL's top receiver in 2025.

title: Women's tournament: UConn still title favorite as Virginia upset shakes up the odds
content: Odds for each team to advance through the bracket and to win the 2026 women's college basketball championship.

title: "What Generals Broke, Soldiers Can't Fix": Iran Speaker's Warning To Trump
content: In a stern warning to the US forces, Iran's parliamentary speaker, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, said that sending troops to the region will not solve what the US and Israeli leadership have botched.

title: "Negotiating With Yourselves?" Why Iran Has Nothing To Lose, Trump Does
content: Four weeks into the conflict, Trump appears to have realised that he underestimated Tehran's resilience

title: Trump's Approval Hits New Low As Fuel Prices Rise Amid Iran War: Poll
content: A Reuters poll noted that Trump's handling of the cost of living crisis and his war efforts against Iran have led to a nosedive in his approval ratings.

title: Opinion: Opinion | A Northern Discomfort for Mamata Banerjee
content: In the last assembly elections in 2021, the TMC's wounds in North Bengal were visible not just in the arithmetic of seats but in the geometry of votes

title: Parliament Live Updates: Lok Sabha Passes Finance Bill, All-Party Meet At 5 pm
content: Parliament Live Updates: Once passed, the Finance Bill, 2026 will bring into force changes in income tax rates, as well as customs and excise duties.

title: "Blood Everywhere": Air Canada Survivor Recounts 12 Seconds Before Crash
content: Jack Cabot, 22, said the passenger next to him injured their face and blood was gushing from their nose.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Inside Iran's 'Leader-Proof' War Machine, Designed To Absorb Every Blow
content: How Iran prepares successors to successors, with the system being built to withstand the shock of individual losses.

title: Kotak Bank 'Fraud': How Safe Are Your Bank Deposits? What Rules Say
content: Banking frauds in India fall into familiar patterns: misappropriation, forged documents, manipulation of accounts, or unauthorised transactions.

title: US-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: Iran Fires Missile Salvo Across Middle East After Trump Signals Progress In Talks
content: US President Donald Trump threatened to "obliterate" Iran's power plants if Tehran does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz for shipping traffic.

title: Is Your Home In A PNG Network? Get A Connection Or You May Lose LPG Supply
content: As India grapples with an LPG shortage due to the Middle East conflict, the government is pushing households and commercial users to switch to PNG.

title: Pakistan's 1971 Blood Trail Mention In Tarique Rahman's Genocide Day Message
content: On the night of March 25, 1971, the Pakistan Army launched Operation Searchlight, a planned military offensive designed to crush Bengali demands for democracy, autonomy and the transfer of power after the Awami League's electoral victory in Pakistan'

title: "No Criminal Consequences": Court Junks Plea Against "Vande Mataram" Circular
content: The Supreme Court termed the plea filed by one Muhammed Sayeed Noori as "premature" and based on "vague apprehension of discrimination".

title: Heat, Not Floods, May Become Climate Change's Biggest Killer: Report
content: While cooler areas may see fewer deaths, many hotter countries and cities will face rising mortality if no action is taken.

title: 'Tried To Prove Child Has No Proof': Court Blasts Cops In Rape Case
content: Supreme Court raSupreme Court raps Gurugram Police in four-year-old child's rape case.ps Gurugram Police in four-year-old child's rape case.

title: At Uddhav Thackeray's Farewell, Praise From D Fadnavis And An E Shinde Dig
content: Uddhav Thackeray's tenure in the Maharashtra Legislative Council ended today along with eight other members

title: Puneet Gupt Appointed DNPA Chairperson, Anant Goenka Vice Chairman
content: Gupt has been actively involved in DNPA's work and initiatives during his tenure as Vice Chairperson.

title: LPG Crisis Bites Chennai, Restaurants Reel Despite Supply Boost
content: Despite the Centre announcing a 50 per cent increase in commercial LPG allocation to ease the strain, industry players say the crisis is far from over, with supplies yet to stabilise fully.

title: Unrealistic Or Sustainable? Row Over AIADMK's Cash Support, Subsidy Promises
content: AIADMK chief Edappadi K Palaniswami insisted that the promises would be met through "better financial management."

title: Transfer rumors, news: Four clubs chase Spurs defender Gray
content: Manchester United, Dortmund, Chelsea and Aston Villa hold an interest in versatile Tottenham defender Archie Gray. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Govt mandates switch to piped gas: Centre orders transition to PNG wherever available
content: Households in areas with available piped natural gas (PNG) infrastructure must switch from LPG within three months or face supply cessation. This new policy, aimed at enhancing energy security and diversifying fuel sources amidst global disruptions, streamlines pipeline approvals and encourages a transition to PNG for continuous supply. Exceptions exist for technically infeasible connections.

title: Barred by interim govt, BCB now wants Hasina-linked cricketer back for 'long term'
content: Shakib, 39, had moved to the United States after the country's Awami League government led by Sheikh Hasina was removed following a student uprising in 2024. The interim government had barred Shakib from representing Bangladesh.

title: 'Historic step': After Uttarakhand, Gujarat passes Uniform Civil Code Bill
content: Gujarat has passed its Uniform Civil Code Bill, 2026. This makes it the second Indian state to adopt a unified law for marriage, divorce, and inheritance. Union Home Minister Amit Shah hailed it as a historic step for equality. Chief Minister Bhupendra Patel stated the UCC will ensure equal rights and dignity for women across all communities.

title: Sonia Gandhi in hospital: Doctors say veteran Congress leader’s condition is stable
content: Veteran Congress leader Sonia Gandhi is stable and under observation at Sir Ganga Ram Hospital after being admitted Tuesday night due to feeling unwell following a weather change. Doctors are conducting investigations for potential stomach and urinary tract infections, with antibiotics administered as part of her treatment.  Her condition is being closely monitored by a medical team.

title: Meta eyes biggest-ever layoffs: What HR’s email told employees
content: Meta is preparing for its largest-ever round of layoffs, with employees in wearables and ads told to work from home as cuts loom. Reuters reported the reductions could affect 20% of its nearly 79,000-strong workforce—around 15,800 jobs. The move is driven by Meta's $600 billion AI infrastructure commitment and a broader push toward leaner, AI-assisted operations, compounded by setbacks with its in-house AI models.

title: ‘Dhurandhar: The Revenge’ box office day 7 live: Ranveer Singh starrer chases Rs 700 cr
content: 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' featuring Ranveer Singh and directed by Aditya Dhar has cemented its status as an all-time blockbuster, crossing the monumental Rs. 900 crore gross milestone worldwide in its first week. Despite a massive 3-hour and 49-minute runtime, the espionage thriller has maintained an iron grip on the domestic market, fueled by strong word-of-mouth and festive boosts from Ugadi and Gudi Padwa. From its record-breaking Rs. 114.85 crore peak on Day 4 to its current global gross of Rs. 919 crore, 'Dhurandhar 2' continues to shatter records as the fastest Indian film to breach the Rs. 500 crore mark.

title: 60 m barrels of Russian crude booked by Indian refiners amid global supply strain
content: Indian refiners have significantly increased purchases of Russian crude, securing around 60 million barrels for the upcoming month amidst Middle East conflict-driven supply disruptions. This surge is supported by a US waiver allowing imports of Russian oil loaded before March 12, with refiners also diversifying with Venezuelan and previously Iranian crude.

title: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas wants everyone to believe that AI layoffs are not so bad
content: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas offers an optimistic outlook on AI's impact on jobs, viewing potential layoffs as an opportunity for entrepreneurship. He highlights AI's ability to empower small businesses and individuals to launch ventures with minimal resources, citing examples of successful AI-driven startups.  This perspective contrasts with growing concerns about widespread AI-induced unemployment.

title: 'No shortage of petrol, diesel, or LPG': Oil firms soothe fuel concerns in India
content: Major oil companies have debunked claims of a fuel shortage, assuring the public that supplies are normal and sufficient. Despite global supply tensions due to the Middle East crisis, firms like BPCL, HPCL, and Indian Oil emphasize no panic buying is needed. They are committed to uninterrupted service, with real-time updates confirming smooth operations at retail outlets.

title: Man goes to spit tobacco near railway tracks, dies after being hit by Vande Bharat
content: A man lost his life after being struck by the Patna-Howrah Vande Bharat Express at Barh railway station. The incident occurred on platform number 2. He was taken to Barh Sadar Hospital but succumbed to his injuries. The deceased's identity remains unestablished. Railway authorities have urged passengers to maintain a safe distance from platform edges.

title: China tightens grip on Manus AI founders over Meta’s $2B acquisition
content: Chinese authorities have prevented two co-founders of AI startup Manus from leaving the country amid an investigation into its $2 billion acquisition by Meta. The probe, initiated in January, scrutinizes potential violations of foreign investment and national security rules, highlighting Beijing's growing apprehension over sharing advanced AI technology with foreign entities. No charges have been filed yet.

title: 'Adequate stock available': Govt issues clarification on LPG refill booking timeline
content: Government has debunked false reports circulating on social media about revised LPG refill booking timelines.  Existing booking periods of 25 days in urban and 45 days in rural areas remain unchanged.  Authorities assure sufficient fuel stocks amidst Middle East tensions and urge the public to avoid panic buying and misinformation.

title: Dhoni hits Mukesh Chaudhary for a six; internet trolls with 'Isko koi bhi maar de' - watch
content: Veteran MS Dhoni, at 44, gears up for his 19th IPL season, showcasing his enduring finishing prowess in a recent net session.  Despite trolling for the bowler, Dhoni's continued impact is evident.  CSK, under Ruturaj Gaikwad, faces challenges with Nathan Ellis's injury but has bolstered their squad with Sanju Samson, signaling a future-focused approach.

title: Why US supercarrier had to leave Middle East amid Iran war: Many problems of USS Gerald Ford
content: The US Navy's most expensive aircraft carrier, USS Gerald R Ford, is facing renewed scrutiny after a fire forced its departure from a Middle East deployment. This incident highlights ongoing concerns about the $13.2 billion warship's operational readiness, with Pentagon testing revealing insufficient data on its combat effectiveness and reliability of key systems.

title: Cooper Connolly looks to learn, grow, and emulate Shaun Marsh at Punjab Kings
content: Perth-born Cooper Connolly, who has modelled his batting on Shaun Marsh, a former star for Punjab Kings (then Kings XI Punjab), is set to turn up for the Mohali-based franchise as he looks to emulate his idol. The 22-year-old was bought by Punjab Kings for Rs 3 crore during last year’s IPL mini auction.

title: Who is Harshil Kalia? Actress who died in a tragic car crash
content: Harshil Kalia, 30, Rajasthan actress-model, died in Jaipur crash on March 23. Car flipped on Shipra Path after losing control near 11:30 PM; locals rushed her to hospital, but head injuries fatal. Police probe speeding or overtake. CCTV out; body post family. Starred in Crime Next Door, music videos.

title: 'Anti-Bengali party': Mamata vs BJP over puja pandal permission row
content: As West Bengal assembly elections approach, the BJP and TMC are trading sharp accusations. BJP chief Nitin Nabin alleged Hindus need court permission for puja pandals while Muslims can offer namaz freely. Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee countered, calling the BJP an 'anti-Bengali' party and raising concerns about voter roll deletions and citizenship.

title: Iran tensions ripple through Pak’s economy: Fuel cost soars, bills pile up and more
content: The Middle East crisis is severely impacting Pakistan's already fragile economy, triggering soaring oil and LNG prices. This energy shock is fueling inflation, raising travel costs, and straining household budgets. Experts warn of deepening vulnerabilities, with potential collapse if the conflict escalates and reserves dwindle, disproportionately affecting the poor.

title: Ex-underworld don Muthappa Rai’s son denies performing Lamborghini stunt in Bengaluru
content: Ricky Rai, son of former underworld don Muthappa Rai, claims a Lamborghini incident near Anil Kumble Circle was a brake-related skid, not a stunt. His counsel stated Rai was a passenger, not the driver, and the car skidded on a muddy, repaired road. Police are investigating, with the driver admitting to being behind the wheel.

title: He left a high-paying job in Switzerland and found better success in India
content: In 1979, Jadav Payeng began planting trees on a barren sandbar in Assam, transforming it into Molai Forest.  His decades of patient work, driven by the sight of dying animals, created a thriving ecosystem.  This remarkable conservation story highlights the power of individual action and consistent stewardship in environmental restoration.

title: Homebuyers’ interests must be protected in insolvency: SC directs to record reasons
content: A Bench of Justice J.B. Pardiwala and Justice R. Mahadevan delivered the judgment while deciding appeals arising from insolvency proceedings initiated against Takshashila Heights India Private Limited, the developer of the real estate project Takshashila Elegna in Ahmedabad.

title: Congress slams BJP after 24 Akbar eviction notice
content: The Congress party has received an eviction notice for its long-standing national headquarters at 24, Akbar Road, with a deadline of March 28. The party alleges the move is politically motivated by the BJP government to divert attention from the Iran war. Congress plans to challenge the notice in court, calling it undemocratic and illegal.

title: 'Shameful to summon 3-yr old': SC raps Haryana Police over 'insensitive' handling of child rape case
content: The Supreme Court has sharply criticized Haryana Police and the Child Welfare Committee for their insensitive handling of a three-year-old rape survivor's case. The court condemned summoning the minor to the police station and expressed concern over the apparent downgrading of charges under the Pocso Act, emphasizing the need for a child-sensitive approach.

title: 51-year-old woman survives life-threatening pulmonary embolism and giant uterine fibroid
content: A 51-year-old woman experienced a life-threatening pulmonary embolism, a massive blood clot in her lungs, following months of subtle symptoms like weight loss and heavy bleeding. Doctors at Medicover Hospital in Navi Mumbai successfully treated the clot with a delicate thrombectomy and then removed a giant uterine fibroid, the likely underlying cause, saving her life through a coordinated medical effort.

title: Dinner invite, hidden gun: How Ghaziabad man shot wife, her lover; leaves 7 children behind
content: A man in Ghaziabad allegedly murdered his wife and her alleged lover after confronting them over an affair. The accused, Rashid, reportedly shot his wife Shabnam and friend Faheem after a dinner at their home. Their seven-year-old son witnessed the killings before the father fled.

title: Rinku Singh appointed Regional Sports Officer: Salary, role explained
content: Rinku Singh received a dual honor, being appointed vice-captain of KKR for IPL 2026 and then appointed as a Regional Sports Officer by the Uttar Pradesh Government. CM Yogi Adityanath presented him with the appointment letter, highlighting UP's commitment to prioritizing athletes in government service. This new role will see Rinku shaping the future of sports in Uttar Pradesh.

title: Nayara plans 35-day shutdown, 8% of India's refining capacity may take a hit
content: A large portion of the refinery’s output is sold within the domestic market, with exports having declined after the sanctions last year. A considerable share of production is supplied to state-run refiners.

title: 'Dressing up defeat as agreement': Iran mocks Trump with 'negotiating with yourself' dig
content: An Iranian military spokesperson has ridiculed US ceasefire efforts, dismissing Donald Trump's claims of ongoing discussions and stating Iran will never make a deal with the US. The remarks come as the US ramps up its military presence in the region, despite ongoing airstrikes and missile attacks.

title: Iran war impact: Philippines declares energy emergency with only 40 days of fuel remaining
content: The Philippines has declared a national energy emergency due to escalating Middle East conflict, fearing imminent danger to fuel supplies. President Marcos Jr. warned of potential flight groundings and industry rationing. The government is empowered to enforce conservation, fast-track procurement, and provide commuter relief. This move highlights the nation's vulnerability to global oil disruptions.

title: 'Pre-planned massacre’: Bangladesh marks Genocide Day, slams Pakistan over 1971
content: In a solemn observance of Genocide Day, Bangladesh's Prime Minister Tarique Rahman has expressed his profound condemnation of the atrocious acts committed by the Pakistani military during Operation Searchlight on March 25, 1971. He referred to this tragic event, where countless unarmed civilians were mercilessly targeted, as an indelible stain on history

title: Who is Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr? The hard‑line commander now shaping Iran’s security
content: Following Ali Larijani's death, Iran appointed former IRGC commander Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr as the new chief of the Supreme National Security Council. Zolghadr's extensive military and political background, including his IRGC leadership, signals a consolidation of the Revolutionary Guard's influence in key security and foreign policy decisions.

title: Bomb threat to Delhi assembly again: Email claims 16 RDX IEDs planted, blast warning
content: The Delhi Vidhan Sabha received a bomb threat via email on Wednesday, alleging 16 RDX-laden IEDs were planted with a planned explosion at 1:40 PM. The sender cited political grievances, prompting immediate evacuation and deployment of security agencies for thorough checks. An investigation is underway to trace the email's origin and verify the threat's authenticity.

title: FB ‘friend’ turns killer: Parlour owner hacked to death in Kolkata; attacker dies by suicide
content: A 50-year-old beauty parlour owner was found hacked to death in her Garia establishment on Tuesday. The assailant, a 44-year-old man believed to be from Haryana or Kashmir, was discovered dead outside, with police suspecting he died by suicide. Investigators believe a relationship gone sour was the motive.

title: 'Your yorker is breathtaking': Shami breathes fire, stumps shattered
content: Veteran pacer Mohammed Shami, 35, showcased lethal yorkers in Lucknow Super Giants' nets, impressing coach Justin Langer. Bowling coach Bharat Arun expressed excitement about working with Shami again, highlighting his significant contribution to India's past overseas Test victories. LSG's pace attack, a blend of experience and emerging talent, faces the challenge of managing workloads post-injury.

title: How Iran war is helping Kim Jong Un justify North Korea's nuclear arsenal
content: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un defended his nation's nuclear arsenal, citing the ongoing Iran war as justification for strong military deterrence. He accused the US of "terrorism and invasions" and vowed to advance North Korea's "defensive nuclear deterrence." Kim also declared South Korea the "most hostile nation," warning of severe consequences for any provocations.

title: Closure of American bases in Gulf, reparation for attacks: What Iran is demanding in truce deal
content: Escalating Middle East tensions see Iran setting high demands for a ceasefire with the US, including base closures and reparations. The US, meanwhile, has proposed a 15-point plan via Pakistan, focusing on nuclear and missile programs, with a potential one-month ceasefire and sanctions relief.

title: FCRA amendment bill to introduce a new authority to manage assets of NGOs that lose licence
content: Countering the Opposition's charges that the bill is "dangerous", Minister of State for Home Affairs Nityanand Rai asserted that it is "indeed dangerous" for those who engage in forced religious conversion using foreign contributions

title: Live artillery shell found near LoC in Baramulla disposed: J&K Police
content: "A Bomb Disposal Squad team of Baramulla Police was deployed, which safely neutralised and disposed of the live artillery shell in accordance with established safety protocols," says officials

title: Fuel crisis LIVE: No increase in prices of petrol, diesel, says government
content: Tamil Nadu CM Stalin slams Union Government over gas shortage, says PM Modi's 'Covid period' statement has created panic

title: Praful Patel, Tatkare sought to take over NCP after Ajit Pawar's death, wrote to EC: Rohit Pawar
content: The MLA cited documents with signatures of Mr. Patel and Mr. Tatkare which he claims stated that in the absence of a national president, all authority would vest in the national working president and all decisions would be taken by him

title: Delhi Assembly gets second bomb threat in two days; Budget session continues amid security sweep
content: The dog squad and bomb squad personnel are currently checking the Assembly premises after bomb threats were sent to the Assembly’s and Speaker’s official email addresses at 9.50 a.m.

title: Parliament Budget Session LIVE updates: Rajya Sabha discusses Transgender Persons Amendment Bill, 2026
content: Lok Sabha passed Finance Bill, 2026; Parliament will not sit on March 28-29 weekend, Kiren Rijiju informs Rajya Sabha

title: No fuel shortage, say oil firms; urge public to avoid panic buying
content: Oil companies advised customers not to be misled by rumours or engage in panic buying, and to ‘continue with normal consumption patterns’

title: Assembly Elections LIVE: AIADMK releases list of constituencies allotted to its alliance partners
content: The party renominated its chief, K. Palaniswami, Leader of Opposition, from his home turf of Edappadi constituency in Salem district and fielded MLAs and former legislators again from their traditional seats.

title: Kerala polls: CM slams UDF for ‘defamatory attack’ on CPI(M) woman legislator U. Prathibha
content: Pinarayi Vijayan says UDF has backslidden into ‘personally attacking opponents and their families’ because it cannot counter LDF politically

title: T.N. elections: Attempts to create divisions in DMK-led alliance have failed, says CM Stalin
content: Mr. Stalin, in a letter to his party workers, urged them to ignore rumours intended to mislead and to work together with allies to ensure victory in all 234 Assembly segments

title: Congress questions Supreme Court order on SC status for converts
content: Randeep Surjewala says issue of Scheduled Caste status for converts to Christianity and Islam has been pending before a three-judge Bench of the Supreme Court since 2011

title: TMC urges ECI to remove Bhabanipur returning officer, claims he has 'links' with BJP
content: "There exist credible apprehensions regarding the independence and ability of Surajit Roy in discharging his duties as returning officer," says Mr. O'Brien

title: TGSRTC reduces Metro AC and Deluxe buses fares in Hyderabad by 30% in view of surging demand for fuel
content: TGSRTC has  30% reduction in travel fares on Metro AC and Metro Deluxe services in Hyderabad to mitigate effects of surge in fuel prices

title: Uttam Nagar clash case: SC asks family of Tarun Butolia to approach Police Commissioner over safety
content: Supreme Court says Delhi Police should assess threat perception in Uttam Nagar case; family may move Delhi High Court if concerns persist

title: I-PAC raid: Supreme Court poses question to West Bengal CM
content: Court’s query comes in reaction to submissions made by both Ms. Banerjee and State of West Bengal that Directorate of Enforcement (ED) cannot move Supreme Court directly under Article 32 of Constitution, “crying” violation of its fundamental rights.

title: ECI probing glitch that marked all Bengal voters 'under adjudication': Official
content: "The issue was noticed on the night of March 24 and was caused by a technical error, possibly related to the server or backend integration. It has since been rectified, and we are probing the cause behind it," says ECI official

title: Opposition tears Bill proposing ballot papers in panchayat elections, walks out
content: Terming the Bill a “retrograde” move, Leader of Opposition R. Ashok tore a copy of the Bill before staging the walkout

title: Radikaa Sarathkumar pulls off ₹75-crore ‘Thaai Kizhavi’ power move
content: As her Tamil blockbuster Thaai Kizhavi releases on OTT soon, Radikaa Sarathkumar rewrites rules of profit-sharing and ageing heroines in Tamil industry

title: Gurugram rape case: Supreme Court criticises Haryana Police’s insensitive handling of four-year-old child’s rape case
content: Supreme Court mandates swift action and oversight in the sensitive case, forming a SIT while condemning the Haryana Police’s failure to adequately protect and assist the young survivor

title: AP power dues to Telangana raised in Parliament
content: Despite lodging protests, the Telangana Power Finance Corporation paid a total of ₹1,270 crore up to August 2024. Of this amount, ₹481.82 crore constituted the principal, while ₹788.18 crore was paid as interest.

title: Activists condemn Transgender Bill passage in Lok Sabha, says haste in Rajya Sabha 'scary'
content: "How can you have a situation where Parliament discusses and passes a law meant for a community, which is protesting right outside Parliament against the same law?" asks Anish Gawande

title: Police seize 31 commercial gas cylinders transported illegally in Madhapur
content: A case was registered at the Madhapur Police Station, and notices will be issued to those involved in the unauthorised transport.

title: TMC bagged Muslim votes but did nothing for community: Owaisi in Kolkata
content: The Hyderabad MP claimed that Mamata Banerjee's politics had indirectly helped the BJP expand its footprint in West Bengal

title: CSK’s ‘Roar 26’: Nostalgia, Dhoni buzz and an AR Rahman concert light up Chepauk before IPL 2026
content: Chepauk turned into a sea of yellow as thousands of fans celebrated Chennai Super Kings’ cricketing legends in ‘Roar 26’, a perfect curtain raiser to IPL 2026

title: Agnikul test-fires first-of-its-kind 3D-printed booster engine
content: Unlike traditional engines that take several months to manufacture, Agnikul’s engines can be fully 3D printed in just seven days. This reduces production complexity and turnaround time

title: Kerala State Assembly Elections 2026: Sitting CM & Ministers
content: As Kerala gears up for 2026 State Assembly elections, the performance of sitting Ministers from Left Democratic Front (LDF) is in focus

title: South Star Rail and Tour Times offers three tour packages from Mangaluru to North East by train
content: The North East package trains will depart from Madurai with convenient boarding points in Kerala. Tourists travelling from Mangaluru will be offered complimentary transfers to Palakkad, Ottapalam or Thrissur, based on their preference

title: Compensation, interest on land acquisition payout can't be contingent on financial burden: Supreme Court
content: The Bench said interest payable to the landowners will be according to the land Acquisition Act, which is 9%, and not the NHAI Act, which has a 5% cap

title: Supreme Court junks plea against MHA circular on Vande Mataram, terms it 'vague apprehension of discrimination'
content: The Bench told the petitioner that he can approach the court in case of any penal action or notice to him, and observed that at present the petition is nothing but a "vague apprehension of discrimination".

title: Fugitive Punjab AAP MLA Pathanmajra arrested from Gwalior
content: The case was registered based on a complaint by a Zirakpur-based woman, who alleged that the MLA misrepresented himself as a divorcee, entered into a relationship with her and later married in 2021 while already being married.

title: Bose Krishnamachari quit Kochi Biennale following sexual harassment allegation, says foundation
content: KBF chairperson V. Venu says the complaint triggered an internal investigation, though no police report has been filed

title: Kerala polls: Buzz over Congress’ CM candidate continues despite leadership’s efforts to rein it in
content: Veteran leader P.J. Kurien endorses Ramesh Chennithala during UDF election event. While Chennithala downplays it, stating the final decision rests with High Command, senior leader K.C. Joseph warns against potential divisiveness of such speculation. Satheesan seeks to sidestep the debate

title: What is Force Majeure clause?
content: Defined as ‘Superior Force’ in French, Force Majeure is a safety valve for business parties to abstain from professional duty in extreme geo-political events

title: T.N. CM Stalin accuses Centre of using delimitation to divert attention from cooking gas shortage
content: “Is the supply of gas cylinders and foreign policy under the control of the State government?” he questioned

title: Namaz can be offered freely in Bengal, but court approval needed to organise pujas: Nitin Nabin
content: Here, there is permission to offer namaz, but to perform puja and erect pandals, one has to seek permission from the High Court, says BJP chief Nitin Nabin

title: Approximately 20,000 kilolitres of petrol available, no fuel shortage in any part of Telangana: Civil Supplies Commissioner
content: Minister Raveendra claimed that 1,500 petrol and diesel tankers are on standby, supplying fuel to stations in this emergency

title: Kumbh Mela fame Monalisa Bhosle accuses director of ‘misbehaving’ with minor girls
content: Monalisa Bhosle made the allegation at a press conference in Kerala, where she also sought help from the Centre and State governments of Kerala and Madhya Pradesh, claiming that she and her husband were receiving death threats

title: Kerala polls: K.C. Venugopal says UDF to move ECI against Rajeev Chandrasekhar over ‘concealed assets’
content: Congress leader alleges poll affidavit violation by Kerala BJP president; accuses CPI(M) of bar licence graft and slams Centre, State over price rise and farmer distress

title: Hyderabad woman with alleged links to ISIS and AQIS terror groups arrested in Vijayawada
content: Andhra Pradesh police arrested three youth of the same group in Vijayawada on Tuesday, and booked them under UAPA Act, say police

title: Supreme Court-appointed panel asks Centre to withdraw Transgender Bill that removes right to gender self-determination
content: The Committee also called for widespread community consultation before any further amendments are brought to the 2019 law

title: Sattankulam Jayaraj-Benicks custodial death case: Family wants severe punishment for convicted policemen
content: Family members of Jayaraj and Benicks, who died due to custodial torture at the Sattankulam police station, sought the maximum possible sentence for the nine convicted policemen.

title: No fuel shortage in Telangana: Petroleum Dealers Association
content: Rumour-driven panic buying triggers three-fold surge in fuel sales, says the association on March 25, 2026

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: How to check your name in electoral roll before March 26 deadline
content: If your name is not yet included and you wish to vote in the April 23 election, you can apply for inclusion until March 26

title: Rush at Hyderabad fuel outlets for second day; people join serpentine queues from March 25 early morning
content: Telangana Civil Supplies Department on Tuesday (March 24, 2026) attributed the ‘no stock’ boards at some of the outlets to sudden panic driven buying

title: Breaking down the men's hockey tournament: Who will make it to Vegas?
content: the 2025-26 men's college hockey campaign has seen the balance of power firmly entrenched in the Midwest and West . the NCHC and Big Ten dominated the top of the national rankings virtually the entire season . Michigan State, which won the conference's regular-season title, also earned a no. 1 seed .

title: What returning production looks like for the 2026 college football season
content: the more continuity and experience you return from last season, the more likely you are to improve . it's still better to return a lot of your production than a little, even if last year's headliner bombed . a combination of injuries, tactical stagnation and disappointing development held back the Tigers .

title: Bills' massive bison statues anchor Highmark Stadium's Family Circle in new renderings
content: the bison statues and the Family Circle are a part of an area that will be a first welcome to the new stadium . the installation will feature three stainless steel bison -- a bull, cow and calf -- modeled after the American bison .

title: From Dowman to Messi: Picking the world's best soccer players at every age
content: the world's best player isn't obvious, and it changes every year, if not every month . there will be plenty of time to debate this, especially because it's a world cup year . if we can convince ourselves of two contradictory truths, we will do whatever we can .

title: Men's tournament first bets: Picks to make now for the next two rounds
content: the men's basketball tournament field has been whittled down to just 16 teams . three of the four no. 1 seeds ( Duke , Arizona and Michigan ) are still in competition . top-seeded Florida got knocked out after a single-point victory by Iowa .

title: Week 7 Top 25 and how to watch
content: the longhorns have won their past 26 games -- their only loss of the season came in early february . the other biggest mover in the top 10 was Florida, which won two of its three games against then-No. 1 Tennessee last week . there are no more undefeateds in the poll, with Grand Canyon losing its first game last Tuesday .

title: Marlins' two-foot 'Machete' leads 2026 new ballpark foods
content: the Miami Marlins are serving up the "Machete" at home games . the tortilla is griddled on the flat top with melted mozzarella and Oaxaca cheese, carne asada, salsa verde and cilantro . this season's season is no different with new creations making headlines .

title: Welcome to WNBA chaos: Breaking down a chock-full offseason
content: the WNBA and women's national basketball players association agree to a new collective bargaining agreement . the agreement gives way to what both sides have described as a "transformational" deal . despite months of negotiations to reach this point, the previous CBA expired in October .

title: Scientists make silkworm-inspired odour-tracking robot that can locate survivors in disaster areas

title: News: AL East teams make rotation decisions
content: the fantasy baseball buzz file aims to provide fantasy managers with the intel they need as news breaks around MLB . both the Boston Red Sox and Tampa Bay Rays delivered unexpected news regarding their rotations on Tuesday . it's an unexpected setback for a pitcher potentially set to take a big step forward with the team's IL .

title: 'A litmus test for the system': $50 million rosters and Nebraska's big challenge
content: the house settlement established a set of rules for paying players . it was intended to prevent the top programs from spending at a pace that made it impossible for the 100-plus other schools to compete . but those top programs have aggressively pursued loopholes to build rosters that are often worth double the money schools are allowed to share directly with their players. now, those rules are facing their first real test .

title: Women's March Madness Day 4 takeaways: How every team reached the Sweet 16
content: the final day of the second round of the 2026 women's NCAA tournament is underway . we're tracking every game as the regional semifinals take shape . the three no. 1 seeds moved on easily, but there was plenty of intrigue elsewhere .

title: Ranking each team's top prospect: Hagens, Iginla, Martone, more
content: every NHL franchise has a prospect pool because of a lack of draft capital . some players are polished and NHL-ready, producing at high rates in other leagues, while others are early in their development with a high ceiling . the player must be under 23 and not an established NHL player .

title: Men's March Madness Pain Index: Ranking all 52 NCAA tournament losses
content: a team that walks off the court stunned, jerseys and towels covering tears . a fan base with high expectations and disappointment about the early exit is behind every one of those heartbroken teams . every team's exit is categorized into one of the most devastating .

title: Ready for Opening Day? Here's your guide to the offseason chaos that rocked MLB
content: the new york Mets signed the offseason's no. 1 free agent to a record deal . the two-time reigning champion los Angeles Dodgers sent shock waves through the sport . if you know every signing and trade and still aren't quite sure what to make of the chaos, we've got you covered .

title: MMA divisional rankings: Evloev is back near the top at featherweight
content: movsar Evloev was unranked in his fight with top-five featherweight lerone Murphy . the rest of the 145-pound top 10 drops down one position each . a fighter must have competed over the past 12 months or have an upcoming fight booked .
